ns0:entry.ns0:title: AssetRipper/AssetRipper
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AssetRipper/AssetRipper
Language: c%23
GUI application to analyze game files

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Azure/azure-sdk-for-net
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net
Language: c%23
This repository is for active development of the Azure SDK for .NET. For consumers of the SDK we recommend visiting our public developer docs at https://learn.microsoft.com/dotnet/azure/ or our versioned developer docs at https://azure.github.io/azure-sdk-for-net.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Azure/azure-sdk-tools
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-tools
Language: c%23
Tools repository leveraged by the Azure SDK team.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Devolutions/UniGetUI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Devolutions/UniGetUI
Language: c%23
UniGetUI: The Graphical Interface for your package managers. Could be terribly described as a package manager manager to manage your package managers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JosefNemec/Playnite
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JosefNemec/Playnite
Language: c%23
Video game library manager with support for wide range of 3rd party libraries and game emulation support, providing one unified interface for your games.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PowerShell/PowerShell
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PowerShell/PowerShell
Language: c%23
PowerShell for every system!

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QuantConnect/Lean
Language: c%23
Lean Algorithmic Trading Engine by QuantConnect (Python, C#)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Radarr/Radarr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Radarr/Radarr
Language: c%23
Movie organizer/manager for usenet and torrent users.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: STranslate/STranslate
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/STranslate/STranslate
Language: c%23
A ready-to-go translation ocr tool developed with WPF/WPF 开发的一款即用即走的翻译、OCR工具

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SirDiabo/GithubLauncher
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SirDiabo/GithubLauncher
Language: c%23
A Launcher that Downloads and Updates Applications from Github Releases

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SubtitleEdit/subtitleedit
Language: c%23
the subtitle editor :)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Tichau/FileConverter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Tichau/FileConverter
Language: c%23
File Converter is a very simple tool which allows you to convert and compress files using the context menu in windows explorer.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: builtbybel/FluentCleaner
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/builtbybel/FluentCleaner
Language: c%23
A real WinUI desktop cleaner with terminal control and multi-database support

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/aspnetcore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/aspnetcore
Language: c%23
ASP.NET Core is a cross-platform .NET framework for building modern cloud-based web applications on Windows, Mac, or Linux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/maui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/maui
Language: c%23
.NET MAUI is the .NET Multi-platform App UI, a framework for building native device applications spanning mobile, tablet, and desktop.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/runtime
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/runtime
Language: c%23
.NET is a cross-platform runtime for cloud, mobile, desktop, and IoT apps.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/skills
Language: c%23
Repository for skills to assist AI coding agents with .NET and C#

ns0:entry.ns0:title: iOfficeAI/OfficeCLI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iOfficeAI/OfficeCLI
Language: c%23
OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: k1tbyte/Wand-Enhancer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/k1tbyte/Wand-Enhancer
Language: c%23
Advanced UX and interoperability extension for Wand (WeMod) app

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mcmonkeyprojects/SwarmUI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mcmonkeyprojects/SwarmUI
Language: c%23
SwarmUI (formerly StableSwarmUI), A Modular Stable Diffusion Web-User-Interface, with an emphasis on making powertools easily accessible, high performance, and extensibility.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: memstechtips/Winhance
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/memstechtips/Winhance

ns0:entry.ns0:title: unchihugo/FluentFlyout
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/unchihugo/FluentFlyout
